name: Sugar Plum Mince Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine prunes and port in a covered container; let stand overnight.
2. Add mincemeat and walnuts to prune mixture; set aside.
3. Roll half the pastry out on a floured board and use to line a 22 cm (9-inch) pie plate. Trim and flute edges.
4. Spoon prune-mincemeat filling into pastry shell.
5. Roll out remaining pastry with egg; sprinkle with sugar.
6. Bake in an oven set to 220°C (425°F) for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce the heat to 190°C (375°F); continue baking for 20 to 25 minutes until crust is golden and filling is bubbly.
8. Cool on a rack. Serve wedges with whipped cream, sweetened to taste. Makes one 22 cm (9-inch) pie.
